name: Eeveelution Forest
description:
Background

You located a large area-about 100 acre-that is inhabited by humanoid versions of each eeveelution. Feel free to do anything you want and start with any kind of character you want.

Location

The main area is 100 acres

-The Forest-

Filled with lush grass that blows slightly in the wind. Vines hand from a few of the trees, which tend to be resting spots for a few of the eeveelutions. In the middle of the forest is a much denser area of trees, this one blocks most sunlight and only lets in a nice breeze that always seems to be passing through the land. There are a few patches of sunlight that make their way into clearings inside the forest, nice spots to soak up the sun.

-The River-

A deep blue river, slow and peaceful. Tends to really only be swum in by Vaporeon. There are rocks located around and in the river, which are amazing spots to lounge in the sun and relax. River is about 14 foot deep and 15 ft wide. Passes right along the edge of the forest, separating it from the plains. There is a rock formation around the middle of its length that lets you reach the other side.

-The Plains-

Area directly on the opposite side of the forest river, about a third of the total land. Wind blows very freely out in the plains, a nice cool breeze. A nice short layer of grass covers the area, and its almost all flat.

-The Caves-

Right at the edge of the 100 acres, at the northernmost point of the forest. The caves are the place everyone goes to when it starts to rain (Except Vaporeon). The caves are spacious enough to fit everyone inside with a comfortable amount of space left. The air inside is cool and relaxing, and its a nice alternative to the sun spots around the 100 acres. Nothing else lives in the cave*
creator: Tix0909
